scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=@(5173,8000); foreach($p in $ports){$conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($c in $conns){Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}}; exit 0"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend-node && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
